column3: Identify the Return Voucher status utilizing the Finance View in the Legacy Order View

IF: Item is LESS than $500 WSC Respond to the supplier utilizing the LP Return WSC <$/€/£500 template, then leave the ticket in Waiting for Support status. Make sure you update the template with the correct team name based on the voucher status. IF: Item is MORE than $500 WSC Respond to the supplier utilizing the LP Return WSC >$/€/£500 template, then leave the ticket in Waiting for Support status. Make sure you update the template with the correct team name based on the voucher status.

column2: Transfer to the Appropriate Finance Group
column3: IF: Pre-Voucher If the return is pre-voucher, transfer the ticket to Finance Operations (FINSAP Project in SupportHub) IF: Post Voucher If the return is post-voucher, transfer the ticket to Supplier Claims (CR Project in SupportHub)
